goal: Benchmark recent SOTA regime/uncertainty baselines AGAINST our honest A-share protocol. We do NOT try to match their published US-market numbers (different data/task, mostly no code) -- the fair, decisive test is whether THEIR methods survive OUR leakage-free, cost-aware, cross-period evaluation. Three reimplementations on D1 + our walk-forward + A-share round-trip cost + date-clustered CIs + the Deflated Sharpe Ratio (multiple-testing correction): (EXP-A) rolling-HMM regime + LightGBM (Regime-Aware LightGBM, MDPI Electronics 2026) vs our trend/vol/disaster regime-gating vs plain LGBM; (EXP-B) two-level-uncertainty ABSTENTION (When Alpha Breaks, arXiv:2603.13252) on our onset ranker vs always-on vs trend-gate; (EXP-C) NMI-normalized + permutation-significant info-theory baseline (Financial Information Theory 2511.16339 + Conditional P-threshold MI 2601.00395) to position our interaction-information C6. The story the paper buys: 'stronger regime detectors / abstention / info-theory framings, re-run under our honest protocol, are ALSO sub-cost / null' -- or, if one survives, an honest positive we must report. $0 (CPU; reuse D1 + regimes + long_only + ashare_cost + mutual_info + LightGBM; hmmlearn installed).
env: Use .venv-xpu (lightgbm 4.6, hmmlearn 0.3.3, scipy, sklearn). Reuse src/train_tcn_wf (D1, ROOT, SPLITS test windows 2025Q2/Q3/Q4, select_feature_columns), src/onset/regimes, src/onset/long_only (long_only_excess, summarize_excess, PERIODS_PER_YEAR), src/onset/ashare_cost (DEFAULT_ROUND_TRIP, round_trip_cost), src/onset/mutual_info (MI + permutation nulls), src/onset/candle_geometry, src/onset/run_mi_probe.build. New code under src/bench/.
discipline: Carry ALL prior SIGNs (SIGN-001 gate=runs-correctly; SIGN-D1 cross-period; SIGN-R1 nulls valid + never gated; SIGN-A1 realistic A-share cost + point-in-time; SIGN-003 date-clustered CIs; SIGN-M1 permutation null for MI; SIGN-T1 tradability needs net-of-cost + conditional mean). SIGN-B1 (new): BENCHMARK FAIRNESS -- reimplement each baseline's METHOD on OUR data + OUR protocol (we cannot and must not claim to reproduce their US numbers); always report the Deflated Sharpe Ratio alongside raw Sharpe to correct for the many strategy variants tried (multiple-testing); a baseline 'winning' on raw Sharpe but failing DSR is NOT a win.
acceptanceCriteria: verifyCommand (pytest tests/algo) passes

Method tasks ship a hermetic test (synthetic with KNOWN structure, <5s, CPU); REAL tasks gate on machinery-runs + committed json under results/bench/; findings (incl. a clean null / a baseline that also fails) recorded, never gated (SIGN-R1)
Every comparison reports raw Sharpe + Deflated Sharpe + date-clustered CI, net of A-share cost, per-year + pooled (SIGN-B1, SIGN-D1, SIGN-A1)
$0 new LLM cost

tasks.title: Rolling-HMM regime detector (Regime-Aware LightGBM baseline component)
tasks.rationale: Point-in-time Gaussian-HMM market regime states (reimplementation of the MDPI 2026 rolling-HMM), so EXP-A can condition LightGBM on HMM regimes the same way our regimes.py provides trend/vol/disaster.
acceptanceCriteria: rolling_hmm_states(market_features, n_states=3, lookback, refit_every) -> per-date integer state, POINT-IN-TIME (HMM fit only on data up to t, predict t; no future leakage)
returns a per-date Series alignable via regimes.map_states_to_rows
hermetic: a synthetic 2-regime Gaussian series (low-vol/high-vol blocks) -> recovered states separate the blocks; assert no future bar used (shifting the series shifts states)
tasks.notes: hmmlearn GaussianHMM; refit on a rolling/expanding window, predict next; cache to keep it CPU-cheap.

tasks.title: Deflated Sharpe Ratio (multiple-testing correction)
tasks.rationale: Bailey & Lopez de Prado Deflated Sharpe Ratio -- corrects observed Sharpe for the number of strategy variants tried, skew, kurtosis, and sample length. Required by SIGN-B1 so a baseline cannot 'win' by multiple-testing luck.
acceptanceCriteria: deflated_sharpe(sharpe, n_obs, skew, kurtosis, n_trials, periods_per_year) -> {dsr, psr, sharpe_threshold} (probabilistic + deflated Sharpe)
expected_max_sharpe(n_trials, var_sharpe) helper for the SR0 benchmark

hermetic: more trials -> higher SR0 threshold -> lower DSR for the same observed Sharpe; a strong genuine Sharpe at n_trials=1 stays significant; a marginal Sharpe at n_trials=50 deflates below significance

tasks.title: Two-level-uncertainty abstention gate (When Alpha Breaks baseline)
tasks.rationale: Reimplement the When-Alpha-Breaks idea: abstain (hold cash) when EITHER model-prediction uncertainty OR regime-shift instability exceeds a learned threshold. EXP-B applies it to our onset ranker.
acceptanceCriteria: abstain_mask(pred_uncertainty, regime_instability, q_unc, q_reg) -> per-date boolean (True = trade) abstaining on the high-uncertainty / high-instability tail (thresholds = quantiles fit on PAST only, point-in-time)
regime_instability from a state series (e.g. recent state-switch rate) and pred_uncertainty from a dispersion proxy
hermetic: dates with high uncertainty/instability are abstained; a calm confident date trades; thresholds use only past data
tasks.notes: Reuse hmm/trend state-switch rate for instability; cross-sectional score dispersion for uncertainty.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): Regime-Aware LightGBM vs our regime-gating vs plain LGBM
tasks.rationale: The head-to-head with the methodological twin. Same D1 + same walk-forward (SPLITS test windows 2025Q2/Q3/Q4) + same A-share cost + date-clustered CI + DSR.
acceptanceCriteria: arms: (a) plain LightGBM cross-sectional ranker; (b) HMM-regime-gated LGBM (BENCH1); (c) our trend/vol/disaster regime-gated long-only; long-only top-decile market-excess net of round-trip cost
per arm: raw Sharpe + Deflated Sharpe + date-clustered CI, per-year (2025Q2/Q3/Q4) + pooled; non-overlapping 5-day periods
writes results/bench/expa.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; which arm (if any) survives net-of-cost recorded in progress.md
tasks.notes: Depends BENCH1, BENCH2. Reuse select_feature_columns (exclude _fwd*), long_only, ashare_cost, regimes.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): two-level-uncertainty abstention on the onset ranker
tasks.rationale: Does When-Alpha-Breaks abstention rescue the sub-cost onset edge? Compare always-on vs trend-gate vs abstention-gated, net of cost, cross-period.
acceptanceCriteria: arms: always-on onset ranker; our trend-gate; BENCH3 abstention-gate; all long-only top-decile net of cost
per arm: raw Sharpe + DSR + date-clustered CI + per-year; report fraction of periods abstained
writes results/bench/expb.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; whether abstention turns net Sharpe positive recorded
tasks.notes: Depends BENCH2, BENCH3. Reuse run_mi_probe.build / candle features + regimes + long_only.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): NMI-normalized + permutation info-theory baseline vs our interaction info
tasks.rationale: Position C6: recompute our MI2/MI3 leading hits as NMI (Financial Information Theory normalization) with permutation significance (Conditional P-threshold MI), and contrast with our interaction information II=I(X;Y|Z)-I(X;Y). Shows what the existing info-theory framings would (not) reveal vs ours.
acceptanceCriteria: compute marginal NMI + conditional NMI + permutation p for the top stable feature/regime hits; alongside our interaction info from results/motif
writes results/bench/expc.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; the positioning finding (what NMI/perm baselines see vs our II) recorded
tasks.notes: Depends nothing new (reuse mutual_info + results/motif). Add an nmi() helper if needed.

tasks.title: Benchmark synthesis: do SOTA baselines survive our honest protocol?
tasks.rationale: Aggregate EXP-A/B/C into one verdict table + figure: under leakage-free + cost-aware + cross-period + DSR, which (if any) baseline is deployable; position our honest-findings contribution against the 2025-26 SOTA.
acceptanceCriteria: reads results/bench/* -> results/bench/summary.md + paper/sections/figures/bench_summary.png (Sharpe vs DSR per arm, CI bars)
verdict per experiment: SURVIVES vs SUB-COST/NULL, with the binding constraint named; overall positioning sentence
hermetic smoke green; real run + committed
